zh.lifeSummary: 當Maredudd ap Gruffudd, the last Lord of Caerleon於大約1234年出生時，他的父親Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin36歲，母親Jonet verch Rhys17歲。他去世於1270年在英國威爾斯代費德享年37歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯卡迪甘史爾育斯特拉-福盧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maredudd ap Gruffudd, the last Lord of Caerleon于大约1234年出生时，他的父亲Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin36岁，母亲Jonet verch Rhys17岁。他去世于1270年在英国威尔斯代費德享年37岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯卡迪甘史爾育斯特拉-福盧。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

en.lifeSummary: When Maredudd ap Gruffudd, the last Lord of Caerleon was born about 1234, his father, Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin, was 36 and his mother, Jonet verch Rhys, was 17. He died in 1270, in Dyfed, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 37, and was buried in Ystrad-Flur, Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maredudd ap Gruffudd, the last Lord of Caerleon est né environ 1234, son père, Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Jonet verch Rhys, avait 17 ans. Il est décédé en 1270, à Dyfed, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Ystrad-Flur, Cardiganshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maredudd ap Gruffudd, the last Lord of Caerleon um 1234 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin 36 und seine Mutter Jonet verch Rhys 17. Er starb 1270 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Dyfed, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Ystrad-Flur, Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maredudd ap Gruffudd, the last Lord of Caerleon родился около 1234 г., его отцу по имени Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Jonet verch Rhys, 17. Он умер в 1270 г. в местности дифед, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности истрад-флур, кардиганьшир, Уэльс, Великобритания.
